description.en: Sonolux is an immersive audio-visual installation showcased at Klanglicht (Graz) and the LUNA Festival (Eindhoven). As part of a five-person team, I collaborated with sound designers to explore how technology shapes our environment, using the Hilmteich in Graz as our conceptual subject.
description.de: Sonolux is an immersive audio-visual installation showcased at Klanglicht (Graz) and the LUNA Festival (Eindhoven). As part of a five-person team, I collaborated with sound designers to explore how technology shapes our environment, using the Hilmteich in Graz as our conceptual subject.

text.en: My role focused on the visual architecture and generative design. Using TouchDesigner, I developed audio-reactive visuals based on my own photography and film of the site. These visuals morphed in real-time to reflect three distinct sonic states: the present, a utopia, and a dystopia. For the physical installation, we projected onto moving fabric animated by fans—creating a kinetic projection mapping experience that turned over four hours of field recordings into a dynamic, atmospheric spectacle.
text.de: My role focused on the visual architecture and generative design. Using TouchDesigner, I developed audio-reactive visuals based on my own photography and film of the site. These visuals morphed in real-time to reflect three distinct sonic states: the present, a utopia, and a dystopia. For the physical installation, we projected onto moving fabric animated by fans—creating a kinetic projection mapping experience that turned over four hours of field recordings into a dynamic, atmospheric spectacle.

text.en: Situated within the historic Grazer Schlossberg, the installation benefited from a truly unique atmosphere, allowing the visuals to interact with the cavernous, one-of-a-kind location.
text.de: Situated within the historic Grazer Schlossberg, the installation benefited from a truly unique atmosphere, allowing the visuals to interact with the cavernous, one-of-a-kind location.

text.en: Following its debut in Graz, the project was also selected for the LUNA Festival in Eindhoven, allowing us to adapt the installation for an international audience and a new architectural context.
text.de: Following its debut in Graz, the project was also selected for the LUNA Festival in Eindhoven, allowing us to adapt the installation for an international audience and a new architectural context.
